PAGE_TITLE: WordPress Comments Plugin - Live Comments, SSO & Spam Filtering | FastComments
META_DESCRIPTION: Replace slow, ad-filled WordPress comments with FastComments. Real-time live comments, SSO for your existing WordPress users, spam protection, and one-click imports from Disqus. Free trial.
HEAD_KEYWORDS: wordpress comments plugin, wordpress commenting system, fastcomments wordpress, disqus alternative wordpress, wordpress live comments, wordpress comment plugin sso, replace wordpress comments, wpdiscuz alternative
SPIDER_SUBTITLE: FastComments brings a full commenting suite to your WordPress site.
SSO_SUBTITLE: Choose how your WordPress readers sign in to comment.
SSO_SECURE_DESCRIPTION: Sign your logged-in WordPress users straight into the comments with server-side HMAC tokens.
SSO_SIMPLE_DESCRIPTION: Client-side SSO for a quick setup without server configuration.
SSO_NONE_DESCRIPTION: Let readers create their own FastComments accounts or comment anonymously.
HOW_IT_WORKS_SUBTITLE: Three steps to live comments on your WordPress site.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_1_DESCRIPTION: Search for FastComments under Plugins > Add New, then install and activate it. No code required.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_2_DESCRIPTION: Open the FastComments settings, paste in your tenant ID and API key, and pick your SSO mode.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_3_DESCRIPTION: FastComments replaces the native comment box on your posts and pages automatically. That's it.
FAQ_WORDPRESS_FREE_TRIAL_ANSWER: Yes. FastComments offers a 30-day free trial with full access to every feature, including SSO, spam filtering, and imports. No credit card required to start. After the trial, pricing is traffic-based and starts well under $5/month for most sites.
FAQ_WORDPRESS_MIGRATE: Can I import my existing WordPress or Disqus comments?
FAQ_WORDPRESS_MIGRATE_ANSWER: Yes. The plugin includes a one-click import that brings over your existing WordPress comments, including nested threads, author information, and timestamps. Imports from Disqus, Hyvor, and other systems are supported too, and avatars and images migrate automatically.
FAQ_WORDPRESS_KEEP_DATA: What happens to my comments if I uninstall the plugin?
FAQ_WORDPRESS_KEEP_DATA_ANSWER: Nothing is lost. FastComments syncs comments back to your WordPress database, so your comments stay intact whether or not the plugin is active. You can cancel at any time and keep your data.
FAQ_WORDPRESS_SEO: Will switching to FastComments affect my SEO?
FAQ_WORDPRESS_SEO_ANSWER: No. FastComments syncs comments back to your WordPress database and renders them in a way that is accessible to crawlers, even without JavaScript, so search engines continue to index your comment content.
FAQ_WORDPRESS_SPEED: Will FastComments slow down my site?
FAQ_WORDPRESS_SPEED_ANSWER: No. The widget loads asynchronously from a global CDN, so it has no measurable impact on initial page load. Most site owners see reduced page weight after switching from Disqus or wpDiscuz because FastComments has far fewer dependencies.
FAQ_WORDPRESS_GDPR_ANSWER: Yes. FastComments never harvests or sells visitor data and sets only the functional cookies needed for login, so no cookie banner is required for FastComments specifically. If your account resides on eu.fastcomments.com, all of your data stays in the EU, and a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) is available on request.
FINAL_CTA_TITLE: Ready to Upgrade Your WordPress Comments?
FINAL_CTA_DESCRIPTION: Install the plugin, add your API key, and go live in minutes. Zero ads, zero data harvesting, milliseconds to load.
